---
title: "Respiratory Disease Surveillance in England"
subtitle: "A 6‑Day Simulated Analysis for UKHSA Field Services"
author: "Marco Sorbona, PhD"
date: "March 2026"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
---

## Overview

This portfolio project simulates a week of work in the **UKHSA Field Services** team, using real public health data from official UK sources.

All analyses are fully reproducible. Data are downloaded once via `00_setup.qmd` and cached as RDS files for fast rendering.

## Project Structure

| Day | Title | Focus | Output |
|----|----|----|----|
| 1 | Routine Surveillance | Respiratory mortality trends | [HTML](01_day1_surveillance.html) |
| 2 | Outbreak Investigation | C. difficile detection | [HTML](02_day2_outbreak.html) |
| 3 | Local Authority Request | MMR coverage in Leicester | [HTML](03_day3_data_request.html) |
| 4 | Statistical Comparison | North‑South hypothesis test | [HTML](04_day4_statistical.html) |
| 5 | Team Briefing | One‑page synthesis | [HTML](05_day5_briefing.pdf) |
| 6 | Interactive Dashboard | Exploratory data tool | [Dashboard](06_day6_dashboard.html) |

## Data Sources

| Source | Description |
|----|----|
| **Fingertips** | Public health indicators (respiratory mortality, MMR coverage) |
| **UKHSA Data Dashboard** | Infectious disease surveillance (C. difficile) |
| **ONS** | Population estimates and boundaries |
| **NHS Digital** | Hospital Episode Statistics |

## Key Findings

-   **North‑South divide**: Northern regions have 14.1 more respiratory deaths per 100,000 – a 48% higher rate (p \< 0.001, Cohen's d = 2.4)
-   **Outbreak signal**: East Midlands showed 80% of weeks exceeding C. difficile threshold
-   **MMR decline**: Leicester fell from 95.8% coverage (2013) to 88.4% (2024)
-   **Sustained inequality**: The North‑South gap has persisted for over two decades

## Reproducibility

All code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/MarcoSorbona/ukhsa-respiratory-and-otbreak-surveillance).

To reproduce:

1.  Clone the repository
2.  Run `00_setup.qmd` once to download and cache all data
3.  Render any day's `.qmd` file or the dashboard

## Technical Notes

-   **R version**: 4.5.3
-   **Key packages**: `tidyverse`, `plotly`, `flexdashboard`, `leaflet`, `fingertipsR`, `ukhsadatR`, `effectsize`
-   **Colour schemes**: Viridis (colourblind‑safe)
-   **Interactive elements**: `plotly` for charts, `leaflet` for maps, `DT` for tables

## Contact

Marco Sorbona, PhD\
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/marco-sorbona-PhD) \| [GitHub](https://github.com/MarcoSorbona)
